content.en:
A minute passed.

Ye Tian and the Originless Ancestor both stopped, and the result was obvious, Ye Tian passed the assessment.

Of course, whether he can be selected or not depends on the choice of the Twelve Ancestors.

"Endless Ancestor, your strength is really strong, far beyond my imagination, I believe that the Twelve Ancestors will definitely choose you as a member of the inner circle!"

The Originless Ancestor said in an affirmative tone.

"Hopefully!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly, he didn't worry about anything, even if he couldn't enter the inner circle of the Origin Divine Pavilion this time, it wouldn't be a big deal, after all, it was just one less chance, and it wouldn't have much impact on him.

It didn't take long for all the applicants to be evaluated.

And the battle of each applicant who passed was all watched by the Twelve Ancestors, and when they saw the battle picture of Ye Tian and the Originless Ancestor, they were all shocked.

They all knew the strength of the Originless Ancestor, but the Sixfold Supreme could suppress the Originless Ancestor, how could this be?

Unless it is a half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse who has cultivated since he slashed and cultivated, he has such combat power.

But it was obvious that Ye Tian was not such a half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse, otherwise the Originless Ancestor would have been able to see it.

Wow!

The Originless Ancestor was summoned to him by the Twelve Ancestors.

Feng Gu Origin Ancestor asked, "Originless Origin Ancestor, how does the Endless Ancestor make you feel?"

The Originless Ancestor pondered for a moment, and then said: "That Endless Ancestor is very demonic, not only has he created the Eternal Technique, but what he has condensed should be the Eternal Body, and at least the Upper Eternal Body. Moreover, his foundation is extremely solid, and his understanding of the rules of eternity also surpasses that of ordinary half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses. "

The story of the Originless Ancestor is similar to the speculation of the Twelve Ancestors.

After the Originless Ancestor left, the Twelve Ancestors had a decision in their hearts.

"This sixfold supreme being called the Endless Ancestor, my potential is afraid to surpass ours, so I suggest that he be recruited into the ranks of the members of the inner circle of the Source God Pavilion. "

"Naturally, we have to be fair, he's really good and qualified to be one of the inner members. "

"Then choose him!"

The Twelve Ancestors unanimously voted and chose Ye Tian to become a member of the Inner Circle of the Source God Pavilion.

......

Genjin Pavilion.

In the misty void, black thrones emerged, and one person sat on each throne, and on these black thrones sat the members of the inner circle of the Origin God Pavilion.

And twelve of them are golden thrones, and the twelve ancestors are seated.

At this time, there was an empty seat on a throne, but soon a figure appeared and sat on this throne.

The person who arrived was Ye Tian.

"Welcome new members!"

"Welcome new members!"

"Welcome new members!"

Beginning with the Twelve Ancestors, a member of the inner circle welcomed.

"I've seen you!"

Ye Tian also greeted.

At this time, the Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor threw over a ball of information: "Endless Ancestor, these are some information about the members of the inner circle, you will understand it after absorbing it." "

Ye Tian nodded, grabbed this group of information, and quickly understood some things about the members of the inner circle.

For example, the members of the inner circle of the Source God Pavilion held the birthplace of some special resources, and now Ye Tian also knew about it.

The most important thing is that the members of the inner circle of the Origin God Pavilion are able to go to the Primordial Sea.

The Primordial Sea is a special treasure land, a place where the source sea is born, and any drop of sea water there is a condensation of the endless source sea source energy.

However, the Primordial Sea is located in the depths of a special source sea space-time, and without special guidance, the Primordial Sea cannot be found at all.

Because of this, ordinary Supreme Beings were unaware of the existence of the Primordial Sea, and had not even heard of it.

Only some powerful forces knew about the Primordial Sea, and the Origin God Pavilion had the means to enter the Primordial Sea, and every member of the inner enclosure would be able to enter the Primordial Sea.

For example, this time, Ye Tian had just become a member of the inner circle of the Source God Pavilion, and the Source God Pavilion was ready to enter the Primordial Sea.

meeting.

The True River Sword Ancestor spoke: "This time the origin tide of the Primordial Sea is about to begin, and it is the best opportunity to enter the Primordial Sea, but after entering the Primordial Sea, I can't bless you, the possibility of falling is relatively high, if you don't want to go, you can not go." Once we have come out of the primordial sea, we will have a private trade meeting with each other, and we will trade the treasures and resources we need with each other. "

"True River Sword Ancestor, I won't go this time!"

An Eightfold Supreme spoke.

Those Sevenfold Supreme Beings also immediately announced that they would not enter the Primordial Sea, obviously not having much confidence in themselves.

"Endless Ancestor, are you going?" "True River Sword Ancestor looked at Ye Tian, "Your potential is very high, I suggest that you don't have to go this time, you can go next time." "

"True River Sword Ancestor, I'll go!" Ye Tian said: "I have a special clone, this time I entered the Primordial Sea as a clone, and the loss if I fall, it is not big." "

Special clones!

When many supreme beings heard this, they were immediately envious.

The stronger the path of cultivation, the more difficult it is to have a special clone, and many clones have limited potential and cannot become supreme beings at all, so it is simply too difficult to have such a powerful clone.

Basically, the more powerful the cultivation, the fewer strong people will have a clone.

"Special clones!"

As soon as the True River Sword Ancestor heard this, he no longer persuaded Ye Tian.

With a special clone, Ye Tian was not afraid of falling at all, so he naturally wanted to go to the Primordial Sea to try his luck.

This time, there were a total of nine Supreme Beings who were unwilling to go to the Primordial Sea, and the other Supreme Beings all went.

This time, not only did Ye Tian enter the Primordial Sea for the first time, but many Supreme Beings had joined the ranks of the members of the Inner Circle of the Origin God Pavilion early, but they had never been to the Primordial Sea before, so the True River Sword Ancestor and the others began to tell about the specific situation of the Primordial Sea.

For example, after entering the Primordial Sea, you must leave before the end of the Origin Tide, otherwise you will be trapped in the Primordial Sea and 100% will fall.

So far, no one has been able to survive after being trapped in the primordial sea.

Because there is a special doppelganger of a half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse who has been tested and cannot survive, once the origin tide ends, the Primordial Sea will release a terrifying black mist, which will swallow up the half-step Eternal Realm.

Therefore, it is necessary to leave before the end of the origin tide.

The second point is that there will be many treasures born in the Primordial Sea, among which the Eternal Source Object is just an ordinary one, and the Eternal Resources are everywhere, and there are many resources that will help the Sixfold Heaven, the Seventh Heaven, and even the Eightfold Heaven break through.

Also, there are plenty of resources there to elevate Eternals.

Not only that, but the Primordial Sea also had some treasures that made even the half-step Eternal Realm crazy.

The Twelve Ancestors made a list of treasures and gave them to each member, lest anyone not know the treasures and thus miss the treasures, which would be a pity!
